skills.name: Reading Time Calculator
skills.description:
Estimates the reading time for a piece of text based on word count.
Uses configurable words-per-minute rate. Also provides word count,
sentence count, and paragraph count statistics.

test_cases.description: Calculate reading time for short text

input.text: Hello world. This is a test.

test_cases.description: Calculate reading time for a longer article

input.text: Artificial intelligence is transforming the world. Companies across every industry are investing heavily in AI research and development. From healthcare to finance, the applications seem limitless. Machine learning models are becoming more sophisticated each year. Natural language processing has reached human-level performance on many benchmarks. Computer vision systems can now identify objects with remarkable accuracy. The next decade will likely see even more dramatic advances. Researchers are working on artificial general intelligence. The implications for society are profound and far-reaching. We must ensure these technologies are developed responsibly.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Sentiment Classifier
skills.description:
Classifies the sentiment of a piece of text as positive, negative, or neutral.
Also returns a confidence score and a brief explanation.

input.text: This product is absolutely amazing. Best purchase I've made all year!
Terrible experience. The product broke after two days and support never responded.
The package arrived on Tuesday. It was a medium-sized brown box.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Code Reviewer
skills.description:
Reviews a code snippet for bugs, security vulnerabilities, performance issues,
and style improvements. Returns categorized findings with severity levels
and suggested fixes. Supports multiple programming languages.
skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Language Detector
skills.description:
Detects the language of input text and returns the language name,
ISO 639-1 code, and a confidence score. Supports 50+ languages
including mixed-language text detection.

input.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Bonjour le monde, comment allez-vous aujourd'hui?
Guten Morgen, wie geht es Ihnen heute? Das Wetter ist sehr gut.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Email Data Extractor
skills.description:
Extracts structured data from raw email text including sender name,
subject line, key action items, dates mentioned, and urgency level.
Useful for building email triage and auto-response agents.

test_cases.description: Extract data from a meeting invitation email

input.email_text:
From: John Smith
To: team@company.com
Subject: Urgent - Q1 Review Meeting

Hi team,

Please join the Q1 review meeting on March 15th at 2pm.

Before the meeting, please:
1. Prepare your department slides
2. Submit expense reports by March 10th
3. Review the attached budget document

This is time-sensitive as the board presentation is on March 20th.

Best,
John

test_cases.description: Extract data from a low-urgency casual email

input.email_text:
From: Sarah Lee
Subject: Team Lunch Friday

Hey everyone,

Want to grab lunch together this Friday? I was thinking that new Italian place on Main Street.

Let me know if you're in!

Sarah

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Invoice Data Extractor
skills.description:
Extracts structured data from invoice text, including vendor name,
invoice number, line items, totals, and due dates.

test_cases.description: Extract data from a basic invoice

input.invoice_text:
INVOICE
Vendor: Acme Corp
Invoice #: INV-2024-0042
Date: 2024-03-15
Due: 2024-04-15

Services rendered: Web development    $2,500.00
Hosting (annual):                       $300.00

TOTAL DUE: $2,800.00 USD

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Commit Message Generator
skills.description:
Generates conventional commit messages from code diffs.
Follows the Conventional Commits specification (feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore).
Produces a concise subject line and optional body with context.

test_cases.description: Generate commit message for a new feature

input.diff:
diff --git a/src/auth.py b/src/auth.py
--- a/src/auth.py
+++ b/src/auth.py
@@ -10,6 +10,15 @@ class AuthService:
+    def reset_password(self, email: str) -> bool:
+        """Send password reset email to the user."""
+        user = self.db.find_user_by_email(email)
+        if not user:
+            return False
+        token = self.generate_reset_token(user.id)
+        self.email_service.send_reset_email(email, token)
+        return True

test_cases.description: Generate commit message for a bug fix

input.diff:
diff --git a/src/utils.py b/src/utils.py
--- a/src/utils.py
+++ b/src/utils.py
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ def parse_date(date_str):
-        return datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d")
+        return datetime.strptime(date_str.strip(), "%Y-%m-%d")
input.context: Date parsing failed when input had trailing whitespace

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: SQL Query Generator
skills.description:
Generates SQL queries from natural language descriptions.
Supports common SQL dialects (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite).
Includes query explanation and safety warnings for destructive operations.

input.description: Get all users who signed up in the last 30 days, ordered by signup date
input.schema: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, email TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP);

input.description: Delete all inactive users who haven't logged in for over a year
input.schema: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, last_login TIMESTAMP, active BOOLEAN);

skills.name: JSON to CSV Converter

Converts a JSON array of objects into CSV format.
Automatically detects column headers from object keys.
Handles nested values by flattening with dot notation.

skills.name: Markdown to HTML Converter

Converts Markdown text to HTML. Supports headers, bold, italic,
links, images, code blocks, blockquotes, unordered lists,
ordered lists, and horizontal rules.

input.markdown:
# Title

This is **bold** and *italic* text.

- Item 1
- Item 2

> A blockquote

skills.name: Review and Fix Code
skills.description:
A chain skill that first reviews code for bugs and issues,
then automatically generates fixed code with the issues resolved.
Combines the code-review skill with a code-fix step.

test_cases.description: Find and fix SQL injection vulnerability
Review and improve code with minor style issues

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Spell Checker
skills.description:
Checks spelling and grammar in text using an external API.
Returns a list of errors with their positions, suggestions,
and corrected text. Supports multiple languages.

input.text: Ths is a sentnce with speling erors.
This is a perfectly written sentence.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Document Summarizer
skills.description:
Summarizes a document into a concise summary and key bullet points.
Works best on documents under 10,000 words.

input.document: Researchers at MIT announced a breakthrough in battery technology today. The new lithium-silicon design offers three times the energy density of conventional lithium-ion batteries. Field tests showed the batteries retained 95% capacity after 1,000 charge cycles. The team expects commercial applications within five years, starting with electric vehicles.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Tweet Summarizer
skills.description:
Condenses any text into a tweet-sized summary (max 280 characters).
Captures the core message while staying within character limits.
Optionally adds relevant hashtags.

test_cases.description: Summarize a tech article into a tweet

input.text: Researchers at Stanford University have developed a new AI model that can generate photorealistic images from text descriptions in under 2 seconds. The model, called FastDiffusion, uses a novel architecture that reduces the number of denoising steps from 50 to just 4, while maintaining image quality. The team plans to open-source the model next month.
Python 3.13 was released today with improved error messages.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Translate and Summarize
skills.description:
A chain skill that detects the language of input text, translates it
to English if needed, then summarizes it into key points.
Combines the translate-text and summarize-document skills.

input.text: Artificial intelligence is transforming industries worldwide. Companies are adopting AI to improve efficiency, reduce costs, and create new products. Healthcare is seeing breakthroughs in diagnosis through machine learning. Finance uses AI for fraud detection and algorithmic trading. The education sector is personalizing learning through adaptive systems.

La inteligencia artificial está revolucionando la medicina moderna. Los algoritmos de aprendizaje profundo pueden detectar enfermedades en imágenes médicas con una precisión superior a la de los radiólogos humanos. Hospitales de todo el mundo están implementando sistemas de IA para el diagnóstico temprano del cáncer.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Text Translator
skills.description:
Translates text from one language to another.
Auto-detects source language if not specified.

Supports city names and geographic coordinates.

Look up weather in imperial units

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description:
Searches the web using a query and returns the top results with titles,
URLs, and snippets. This is a tool_call type skill — it calls an external API
rather than prompting an LLM.

skills.name: Word Frequency Counter
skills.description:
Counts the frequency of each word in a text document.
Returns a sorted list of words with their counts and the total word count.
Useful for text analysis, keyword extraction, and content analysis.

input.text: the cat sat on the mat the cat ate the food
